tasks.name: session-housekeeping
tasks.description: Clean old reset/checkpoint artifacts and write a session directory report

tasks.name: session-pressure
tasks.description: Check active session context pressure and surface hot sessions

tasks.name: session-recommend
tasks.description: Recommend whether to continue, compact, or switch to a new session

tasks.name: session-handoff
tasks.description: Generate a fresh-session handoff summary from the active session

notes: Separate session maintenance from heartbeat. Run manually or via dedicated cron if needed.
